/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 2.3.0 -current_version 2.3.0 -o ../../bin/libgflags_nothreads.2.3.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libgflags_nothreads.2.3.dylib CMakeFiles/gflags_nothreads_shared.dir/src/gflags.cc.o CMakeFiles/gflags_nothreads_shared.dir/src/gflags_reporting.cc.o CMakeFiles/gflags_nothreads_shared.dir/src/gflags_completions.cc.o
